svg.font-family: ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Inter, system-ui, sans-serif
svg.title: Hyperflow v2.0.1 — Sequenced multi-agent workflow for AI coding tools
svg.desc: Start anywhere. Auto-advance through the chain. Thinking models think, worker models execute, every output gets reviewed.

g.text: Sequenced multi-agent workflow for AI coding tools
Start anywhere. Auto-advance through the chain. Thinking models think, worker models execute, every output gets

svg.text: Cache tech stack and conventions in .hyperflow/
Zero confirmations, minimal output, silent recovery
Configurable thinking/worker per provider + priority chain
Pre-built decomposition: CRUD, API, UI, migration, refactor, debug

g.text: Analyze project, create .hyperflow/ cache, install multi-tool shims
Multi-dimensional analysis + alternatives — refuses to code before appr…
Decompose into parallel worker subtasks; writes task file; auto-chains …
Dispatch parallel workers + thinking-tier reviews + final integration r…
Systematic 5-Whys + hypothesis testing — never patches symptoms
L1 quick → L5 exhaustive review on changes, files, or PRs
Lint, typecheck, build, tests, security sweep, commit, release, push (p…
Show, search, add, edit, prune, archive, clear, stats, migrate

svg.text: Parallel worker dispatch (independent subtasks run simultaneously)
Thinking-tier review of every worker output (iron rule)
Project-scoped persistent memory with tag taxonomy
Hot/warm/cold memory tiering with automatic compression
Lazy memory injection (only tag-matched entries per task)
Multi-tool auto-detection (AGENTS.md, Cursor rules, GEMINI.md, CLAUDE.md)
5 provider support (Claude Code, Cursor, OpenCode, Codex, Antigravity)
Auto-detect provider via env vars or folder presence
Security blocklists for sensitive files and destructive commands
Task tracking with incomplete-task recovery across sessions
